Appearance

VortexHigh-performance V5 motion control.

Stunningly fast, accurate, and incredibly lightweight odometry library built for PROS.

Get Started
View API Reference

Arc Odometry

Incorporates advanced circular-arc integration to track precise movement during very high-speed turns, resolving classical gyro drift issues natively.

Pure Pursuit

Experience unbelievably smooth dynamic path following. Curves and waypoints look like a breeze, even at top speeds.

Integrated Auton Selector

Easily switch between multiple autonomous routines using the V5 brain screen or limit switches.

PID & Slew Control

Robust, classes for PID and Slew rate control to keep your mechanisms stable and your acceleration smooth.

SD Card Logging

Log telemetry and autonomous selection directly to an SD card for post-match analysis.

Lightweight & Modular

Designed to be minimal and fast. Only include what you need, with no heavy overhead or background tasks.
